table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title: Obligations for the logical model for medication dispense for dispensing/pharmacy systems (producer) and prescribing systems or prescription repositories(consumer).

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td:
Medication dispense model obligations
Elements defined in Ancestors:header, dispenseLocation, receiver[x], relatedRequest, medication, dispensedQuantity, timeOfDispensation, substitutionOccurred, dosageInstructions, note

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck11.png)

font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

description.value: Obligations for the logical model for medication dispense for dispensing/pharmacy systems (producer) and prescribing systems or prescription repositories(consumer).

definition.value: Obligations for the logical model for medication dispense for dispensing/pharmacy systems (producer) and prescribing systems or prescription repositories(consumer).

short.value: The person for whom the medication is prescribed. [Used for searching]

definition.value: The person for whom the medication is prescribed. [Used for searching]

short.value: Business identifier(s) for the dispense record. [Used for searching]

definition.value: Business identifier(s) for the dispense record. [Used for searching]

valueMarkdown.value: Systems shall support at least EHDSHealthProfessional data type for the element.

short.value: The actor who issued the dispense record. Responsibility for the dispense should be traceable from this information.

definition.value: The actor who issued the dispense record. Responsibility for the dispense should be traceable from this information.

short.value: Date and time of issuing the dispense record. [Used for searching]

definition.value: Date and time of issuing the dispense record. [Used for searching]

short.value: The status of the dispense, e.g. completed, declined, entered-in-error. [Used for searching]

definition.value: The status of the dispense, e.g. completed, declined, entered-in-error. [Used for searching]

short.value: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

definition.value: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

short.value: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

definition.value: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

short.value: Identification of the person who received the dispensed medication, especially when it was not the patient. When not present, it is assumed that the patient is the receiver.

definition.value: Identification of the person who received the dispensed medication, especially when it was not the patient. When not present, it is assumed that the patient is the receiver.

short.value: Identifier of the prescription item the dispense is related to. [Used for searching]

definition.value: Identifier of the prescription item the dispense is related to. [Used for searching]

short.value: Exact dispensed product. If multiple medications are dispensed together, multiple dispense records should be created.

definition.value: Exact dispensed product. If multiple medications are dispensed together, multiple dispense records should be created.

short.value: Number of dispensed packages if the package size is known, or number of smaller items/units, according to the medication dispensed. A unit is expected.

definition.value: Number of dispensed packages if the package size is known, or number of smaller items/units, according to the medication dispensed. A unit is expected.

short.value: Date and time when medication was handed over. When not present, the time of dispensation is assumed to be the time of issuing dispense record.

definition.value: Date and time when medication was handed over. When not present, the time of dispensation is assumed to be the time of issuing dispense record.

short.value: Whether substitution was made by the dispenser. Definition of substitution is specific to the jurisdiction.

definition.value: Whether substitution was made by the dispenser. Definition of substitution is specific to the jurisdiction.
Obligations for the logical model for medication dispense for dispensing/pharmacy systems (producer) and prescribing systems or prescription repositories(consumer).

valueMarkdown.value: Systems shall support at least EHDSHealthProfessional data type for the element.
